book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should have a star of 4
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 2 nights starting from sunday
If the booking fails how about 1 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve british food and should be in the same price range as the hotel
The restaurant should be in the centre
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 16:30 on the same day
If the booking fails how about 15:30
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
